caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a studio setting with gray acoustic foam panels on the wall behind him. He wears a white t-shirt with a small, partially visible black logo on the chest and black over-ear headphones. A professional microphone, mounted on a boom arm and labeled "Shure SM7B", is positioned directly in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth opening and closing as his facial expressions shift. He maintains a steady gaze, though his head tilts slightly and he begins to gesture with his right hand in the final moments. The camera remains in a static close-up shot, focusing on his upper body and the recording equipment as he continues his conversation.
